requirement_topic.en: OCPP Backend Interoperability and Security Profile
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP后台互操作与安全配置
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP後台互操作與安全配置

summary.en: OCPP is the global open communication protocol between EV charging stations and charging-management systems. Open Charge Alliance currently lists OCPP 1.6, OCPP 2.0.1, and OCPP 2.1 options. Switzerland-facing projects may require OCPP based on operator backend, automation integration, roaming, payment, or maintenance specifications even when OCPP is not the whole-unit product approval route.
summary.zh: OCPP是充电站与充电管理系统之间的全球开放通信协议。Open Charge Alliance目前列出OCPP 1.6、OCPP 2.0.1、OCPP 2.1选项。瑞士项目可能因运营商后台、自动化集成、漫游、支付或维护规范要求OCPP，即使OCPP不是整机产品批准路线。
summary.zht: OCPP是充電站與充電管理系統之間的全球開放通訊協議。Open Charge Alliance目前列出OCPP 1.6、OCPP 2.0.1、OCPP 2.1選項。瑞士項目可能因營運商後台、自動化整合、漫遊、支付或維護規範要求OCPP，即使OCPP不是整機產品批准路徑。

summary.en: China-market charging systems often use GB/T 27930 for charger-to-vehicle battery-management communication. That protocol is not a substitute for OCPP backend interoperability, cybersecurity profile, remote firmware workflow, and operator endpoint evidence required in Swiss deployments.
summary.zh: 中国市场常用GB/T 27930进行充电机与车辆BMS通信。该协议不能替代瑞士投运所需的OCPP后台互通、安全配置档案、远程固件流程和运营端点证据。
summary.zht: 中國市場常用GB/T 27930進行充電機與車輛BMS通信。該協議不能替代瑞士投運所需的OCPP後台互通、安全配置檔案、遠端韌體流程和營運端點證據。

gap.en: The Switzerland file should define exact OCPP version, security profile, authentication and certificate handling, meter-value mapping, transaction semantics, remote maintenance process, SIM or Ethernet design, and operator acceptance test evidence before integration.
gap.zh: 瑞士文件应明确具体OCPP版本、安全配置、身份认证与证书处理、计量值映射、交易语义、远程维护流程、SIM或以太网设计，以及运营端接入前验收测试证据。
gap.zht: 瑞士文件應明確具體OCPP版本、安全配置、身份認證與憑證處理、計量值映射、交易語義、遠端維護流程、SIM或乙太網設計，以及營運端接入前驗收測試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Usually mandatory when operator, roaming, billing, or maintenance specification requires backend interoperability; not itself whole-unit safety certification.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 does not prove OCPP interoperability for Switzerland-facing backend integration.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm OCPP version and security profile with the Swiss operator before shipment and commissioning. China-only protocol evidence cannot replace operator-facing backend interoperability.
compliance_verdict.zh: 出货和调试前应与瑞士运营方确认OCPP版本与安全配置。中国专用通信协议证据不能替代运营方接口后台互操作要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: 出貨和調試前應與瑞士營運方確認OCPP版本與安全配置。中國專用通信協議證據不能替代營運方接口後台互操作要求。
